title: CMO Chitrakoot – ASHA Worker – 40 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CMO Chitrakoot ASHA Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Office Chitrakoot (CMO Chitrakoot) Recruitment 2026 for 40 posts of ASHA Worker. Candidates with 8th pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through CMO Chitrakoot official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Class 8 pass or equivalent, Permanent resident of the same village, Women aged 25-45 years, Preference to married/widow/divorced/separated women

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMO Chitrakoot ASHA Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Chief Medical Office Chitrakoot ASHA Recruitment 2026
